title: Taking a Gap Year
description: A gap year is a break after university when a recent graduate can engage in community service, participate in research, teach, or travel before enrolling in a graduate program or taking full-time employment. If you are thinking about taking a gap year after your senior year, speak to a career coach
text:
Taking a Gap Year
A gap year is a break after university when a recent graduate can engage in community service, participate in research, teach, or travel before enrolling in a graduate program or taking full-time employment. If you are thinking about taking a gap year after your senior year, speak to a career coach to discuss your options, andfind out how to make the most of this year.

text_blocks.text: A gap year is a break after university when a recent graduate can engage in community service, participate in research, teach, or travel before enrolling in a graduate program or taking full-time employment.
